info.name: VSDox Blog API — Complete
info.description: Full API collection. Run in order: Register/Login → Categories → Tags → Media → Posts. Tokens and IDs auto-save via test scripts.

request.description:
Change password for logged-in user.

Validations:
- Both fields required
- new_password minimum 8 characters
- current_password must match

Response: { "message": "Password changed successfully" }
401: { "error": "Current password is incorrect" }

Public — no token required.

Response: [ { "id", "name", "slug", "description", "created_at" } ]

Requires role: admin or editor.

Response: { "message": "Category deleted" }

Public — no token required.

Response: [ { "id", "name", "slug" } ]

Requires role: admin or editor.

Response: { "message": "Tag deleted" }

formdata.description: PNG, JPG, WebP, GIF, SVG. Max 10MB.

request.description:
Upload image to Cloudinary.

Body: form-data → Key: image, Type: File

Response:
{
  "id", "filename", "original_name", "url", "public_id",
  "file_type", "size", "uploader_id", "uploaded_at"
}

Media ID auto-saved.

Paginated list of all uploaded media.

Query params: page, limit

Response: [ { "id", "filename", "original_name", "url", "file_type", "size", "uploader_name", "uploaded_at" } ]

Deletes from both Cloudinary and database.

Response: { "message": "Media deleted" }

Public — no token. Returns published posts only.

Query params:
- page (default: 1)
- limit (default: 10)
- search — searches title and excerpt

Response:
{
  "posts": [ BlogCard objects ],
  "total": 42,
  "page": 1,
  "limit": 10
}

Each post: { id, slug, status, category, date, title, excerpt, image, author, authorRole, body_html, reading_time, views, meta_title, meta_description, categories[], tags[] }

Public — no token. Returns single published post. Also increments view counter.

Replace {{post_slug}} with the actual slug e.g. 'my-first-blog-post'

Response: Full BlogCard-shaped post object including body_html

404: { "error": "Post not found" }

Returns all posts including drafts and scheduled.

Query params:
- page, limit
- status (optional): draft | published | scheduled | archived

Response: { "posts": [ BlogCard objects ] }

body.raw:
{
  "title": "My First Blog Post",
  "body": "# Hello World\n\nThis is **markdown** content.\n\n## Section Two\n\nMore content here with `code` snippets:\n\n- Item one\n- Item two\n- Item three\n\n> A blockquote for emphasis",
  "excerpt": "A short summary shown in blog listings.",
  "status": "draft",
  "featured_image": null,
  "featured_image_alt": "",
  "meta_title": "My First Blog Post | VSDox",
  "meta_description": "SEO description under 160 characters.",
  "category_ids": ["{{category_id}}"],
  "tag_ids": ["{{tag_id}}"],
  "scheduled_at": null
}

request.description:
Create a draft post.

Required: title
Optional: body (Markdown), excerpt, status, featured_image, featured_image_alt, meta_title, meta_description, category_ids[], tag_ids[], scheduled_at

Slug auto-generated from title.
Markdown auto-rendered to HTML.
reading_time auto-calculated.

Status values: draft | published | scheduled | archived

Response:
{ "message": "Post created", "post": { "id", "slug", "status" } }

Post ID + slug auto-saved.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Published Post Title",
  "body": "# Live Content\n\nThis post goes live immediately.",
  "excerpt": "This post is published right away.",
  "status": "published",
  "featured_image": null,
  "featured_image_alt": "",
  "meta_title": "Published Post | VSDox",
  "meta_description": "SEO description.",
  "category_ids": ["{{category_id}}"],
  "tag_ids": ["{{tag_id}}"],
  "scheduled_at": null
}

request.description: Create and immediately publish. Sets published_at = NOW().

request.description: Create a scheduled post. Update scheduled_at to desired ISO 8601 datetime.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Updated Post Title",
  "body": "# Updated Content\n\nThis content has been edited.",
  "excerpt": "Updated short summary.",
  "status": "published",
  "featured_image": null,
  "featured_image_alt": "",

  "meta_description": "Updated SEO description.",
  "category_ids": ["{{category_id}}"],
  "tag_ids": ["{{tag_id}}"],
  "scheduled_at": null
}

request.description:
Full update. All fields optional — only provided fields updated (COALESCE).

Automatically saves previous version as a revision.
published_at set only on first publish.

Response:
{ "message": "Post updated", "post": { "id", "slug", "status" } }

Instantly publish a draft or scheduled post. No body required.

- status = 'published'
- published_at = NOW() only if not already set

Response:
{ "message": "Post published", "post": { "id", "slug", "status", "published_at" } }

Pull a published post back to draft. No body required.

- status = 'draft'
- published_at preserved (not cleared)

Response:
{ "message": "Post withdrawn to draft", "post": { "id", "slug", "status" } }

Soft delete — sets deleted_at. Post hidden from all public queries but stays in DB.

Requires role: admin or editor.

Response: { "message": "\"Post Title\" has been deleted", "id" }
404: Post not found or already deleted

Get version history. A revision is saved automatically on every update.

Response: [ { "id", "post_id", "title", "body", "author_name", "created_at" } ] newest first

All error responses include a 'code' field:

AUTH CODES (401):
  NO_TOKEN       — Authorization header missing
  TOKEN_EXPIRED  — JWT expired (7 day TTL)
  TOKEN_REVOKED  — Token was logged out / blacklisted
  INVALID_TOKEN  — Signature invalid or malformed
  USER_NOT_FOUND — User deleted after token issued

PERMISSION CODES (403):
  FORBIDDEN — Role not allowed for this action

Frontend AuthContext.jsx auto-redirects to /admin/login when TOKEN_EXPIRED or TOKEN_REVOKED is received on any request.
